onboarding.title: Welcome to Social Media
onboarding.subtitle: Plan, create, and track content across Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube, Facebook, and Lemon8
onboarding.sampleDataDescription: We've set up 2 businesses, 5 content pillars, 9 platform accounts, 2 campaigns, 6 posts, 4 ideas, and 1 analytics record as examples.

steps.title: Set up your businesses
steps.description: Add each brand or business you manage. Each business gets its own platform accounts, content calendar, and analytics.

steps.title: Plan your content
steps.description: Schedule posts across platforms, organize by content pillars, and plan campaigns. Use the calendar and pipeline views to stay on track.

steps.title: Capture ideas
steps.description: Save content ideas as they come to you. Track inspiration sources, hooks, and convert winners into scheduled posts.

steps.title: Use your AI agent
steps.description: Ask your agent to schedule posts, generate caption ideas, plan a week of content, or analyze your top-performing posts.

reference.overview: A multi-business social media content calendar and strategy tracker. Plan posts across 6 platforms, organize content by pillars and campaigns, capture ideas, and track performance metrics after publishing.

concepts.name: Businesses
concepts.description: Each brand or business you manage. Toggle between businesses to see their own content, platforms, and analytics.

concepts.name: Posts
concepts.description: Individual content pieces with platform, format, caption, hashtags, and status tracking through idea → drafting → ready → scheduled → published.

concepts.name: Pillars
concepts.description: Content themes (Educate, Entertain, Inspire, Promote, Community) with target mix percentages to maintain balance.

concepts.name: Campaigns
concepts.description: Coordinated content pushes — product launches, series, seasonal content — grouping related posts together.

concepts.name: Ideas
concepts.description: Content idea bank. Capture inspiration, evaluate, and convert the best ideas into scheduled posts.

concepts.name: Analytics
concepts.description: Post-publication performance: impressions, reach, engagement rate, saves, shares, video completion rate.

concepts.name: Platforms
concepts.description: Platform accounts per business — posting frequency targets, best times, preferred formats, and follower counts.

prompts: Schedule an Instagram carousel for Acme Brand on Tuesday about productivity tips
Plan a full week of content for TechPulse across all active platforms
Add an idea for Acme: trending audio remix about morning routines, high priority
Show me all posts scheduled for Acme Brand this week
What is Acme Brand's content pillar mix this month? Am I balanced?
Create a campaign for TechPulse: Product Hunt Launch, starting May 1, across LinkedIn and Instagram
Log analytics for the brand launch post: 2450 impressions, 187 likes, 4.8% engagement
Generate 5 hook ideas for a LinkedIn post about developer productivity
Add a new business: FreshBites, a food delivery startup in the F&B industry
Show me the top performing posts across all businesses this week
tips: Each business has its own platform accounts, posts, campaigns, and ideas — use the business switcher to toggle between them
Posts link to pillars — set pillarId to track your content mix across Educate, Entertain, Inspire, Promote, and Community
Use crosspostOf to track when you adapt the same content across platforms (e.g. an Instagram carousel adapted as a TikTok video)
The Pipeline view shows posts as a kanban: idea → drafting → ready → scheduled → published
Capture ideas immediately — even a title and hook is enough. Convert to posts when ready
Set target posting frequencies per platform in the Platforms section, then track against actuals
Hero content (20%) = big campaigns. Hub (30%) = recurring series. Hygiene (50%) = evergreen
Record analytics at multiple checkpoints (day 1, day 7, day 30) for the same post to track performance over time

businesses.title: No businesses yet
businesses.description: Add your first business or brand to get started. Each business gets its own content calendar and platform accounts.
businesses.suggestedPrompt: Add a business: My Brand, a lifestyle company in the wellness industry

posts.title: No posts yet
posts.description: Start planning your content. Schedule your first post or let your AI agent plan a full week.
posts.suggestedPrompt: Plan 5 posts for this week: 2 Instagram (1 reel, 1 carousel), 2 TikTok videos, and 1 LinkedIn text post

ideas.title: No ideas captured yet
ideas.description: Save content ideas as they come to you. Even a rough concept is worth capturing.
ideas.suggestedPrompt: Add an idea: day-in-the-life video for TikTok, inspired by trending format, high priority

campaigns.title: No campaigns yet
campaigns.description: Create a campaign to coordinate content around a theme, launch, or series.
campaigns.suggestedPrompt: Create a campaign: Brand Awareness Month, April 1-30, across Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn
